title: You are that sorrow
wikitext:
[]: "You are that sorrow"             Quote Post by Veoris » Sun Aug 10, 2014 10:02 pm When Armisael says this, does s/he refer to Rei... or humanity as a whole? Later on Kaworu talks about the loneliness in humanity. So, I'm leaning more towards the latter. What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by Sorrow » Mon Aug 11, 2014 9:16 am I thought this might have been about me. I can't say I'm disappointed. I suppose it would mean that Rei (but people in general) are the sorrow that they feel. Implying that sorrow is people's most dominant, most defining emotion? The entire point of the scene seems to be about people's loneliness and their desire to be with others, though not become others. Anno seems to make a very big point about people feeling lonely, disconnected and how that defines them - "you are that sorrow" just seems to sum up the importance of it.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Aug 11, 2014 9:58 am This sounds like a translation issue. Here is what that passage actually should say: Platinum Script wrote: Rei: Who's there? Me? The me inside the Eva. No, I can sense that there's someone other than me. Who are you? An Angel? The person that we call an Angel? Rei VOICE: Won't you become one with me? Rei: No. I am me. I am not you. Rei VOICE: I see, but it's no use. It's too late now. I'll share what's in my heart with you. I'll share this feeling with you. Doesn't it hurt? See? Doesn't your heart ache? Rei: Hurt? No, you're wrong. It's... ...loneliness? Yes, it's loneliness, isn't it? Rei VOICE: Loneliness? I don't understand. Rei: You hate being alone, don't you? There are so many of us, and yet, you hate being alone. That is what loneliness is. Rei VOICE: That is what is inside your heart. That is your own heart, overflowing with sorrow.

[]:             Quote Post by Sorrow » Mon Aug 11, 2014 10:14 am Where do you find the scripts so nicely laid out? About a month ago I looked around for some and couldn't find anything but one--written by a fan--that didn't explain who was saying what. The translation doesn't really change much about what is being said except it makes it more clear that it is direct to Rei, not people in general, and that her heart is overflowing with sorrow. I like how in the second to last section Rei seems to understand that she herself hates being alone.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Aug 11, 2014 10:25 am I don't know... found them somewhere years ago. I'll see about making them available.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 11, 2014 10:56 am Reichu's EvaCommentary site has the Platinum transcripts available.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Aug 12, 2014 4:34 pm The German version rendered it as, "Your soul consists of nothing else", basically more of a statement of how fundamental the condition of feeling all alone has been to Rei's life so far. She couldn't put it into these words, but it did guide her actions, such as sticking close to people who talk to her and wanting to fulfill the purpose such a person gives her.

[]:             Quote Post by Veoris » Wed Aug 20, 2014 4:09 am NemZ wrote: This sounds like a translation issue. Here is what that passage actually should say:
